files.description: Reddit posts from r/wallstreetbets. Each line is one post in JSONL format.
files.size_note: ~6,919 posts covering the April 2026 dataset window
files.reason_excluded: File size; add to data/raw/ before running pipeline

files.description: Reddit comments from r/wallstreetbets. Linked to posts via parent_id field.

processed.note: Intermediate processed files would be written here in a future version. Current pipeline processes data in-memory and writes final outputs directly to outputs/runs/.

sample_run_outputs.description: Reference run outputs (1,559 raw posts, 283 analyzed, 59 tickers). Reproducible via: python main.py --replay outputs/sample_runs/run_20260412_110302
